title: Efficient Knowledge Graph Construction with Pre-trained Language Models
author: Ningyu Zhang
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Constructing knowledge graphs (KGs) is essential for various natural language understanding tasks, such as question answering, information extraction, and recommendation systems. However, the process of building KGs is typically time-consuming and labor-intensive. This talk introduces technologies and tools to efficiently construct KGs using pre-trained language models (PLMs).
steps_raw: Constructing knowledge graphs (KGs) is essential for various natural language understanding tasks, such as question answering, information extraction, and recommendation systems. However, the process of building KGs is typically time-consuming and labor-intensive. This talk introduces technologies and tools to efficiently construct KGs using pre-trained language models (PLMs).
